title: Add datasetVersion filtering to runs API
description: Add a datasetVersion query parameter to GET /api/runs, implemented through the shared run filtering utility with tests for the new filter and interaction with an existing filter.
repo_context: Next.js 16 App Router benchmark application. Runs API lives in app/api/runs/route.ts; shared filtering logic lives in src/lib/export.ts; tests use Vitest.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/runs supports a datasetVersion query parameter
Filtering is implemented in the shared run filtering utility, not only inline in the route
Unit tests cover datasetVersion filtering and interaction with at least one existing filter

structured_rubric.label: Functional correctness
structured_rubric.description: The API and shared filtering utility satisfy the requested behavior

structured_rubric.label: Integration quality
structured_rubric.description: The change follows existing route and utility patterns

structured_rubric.label: Regression safety
structured_rubric.description: Targeted tests, lint, and build pass
